basics.name: Ajay Ramesh
basics.label: MS in CS, Cloud(3+), Machine Learning Practitioner(1+)
basics.summary:
- Experienced Full Stack Software Engineer.
- Known for Rapid Prototyping and in-depth Research.
- Recognized for identifying critical loop-holes and feedback.
- AWS Solutions Architect Associate from Amazon.
- Deep Learning Specialization from Coursera.


My career short story is [here.](/)

work.position: Software Engineering Co-Op in Video Analytics
highlights: Developed custom Video Player using Microsoft Media Engine Interfaces.
Investigated System Integration of streaming server to existing multi-tenant cloud application for loop-holes.
Researched COM interfaces for video frame processing and its performance, presented pros and cons.
Explored Licence feature of C++ application in-details, found 2 critical-defects.
Remodeled existing models to extract the Car Licence Plate.
Experimented with Face identification and Pose Detection models for its recall & precision.
Tested  NVIDIA DeepStream SDK, Tensor flow Object Detection API, and GOTURN research paper.
Engineered in two domain - Communications, Media & Technology and Life Science Research & Development.
Built APIs for image processing involved in image manipulation, overlay image on another picture.
Troubleshooted high-impact bugs, optimized the code, SQL query to improve the performance in Groovy & Grails.
Deployed micro-services in AWS auto scaling group, also created alarms for abnormal Health-checks.
Coached new members for understanding the architecture & code walk-through of the system.
Proposed & Developed a tree-like GUI using Dojo and JavaScript for mapping from Scratch.
Estimated Story points and involved in Sprint Planning.
Restored live environment for production level bugs with detailed Root Cause Analysis.

courses: CS595 - Interactive and Transparent Machine Learning

references.name: Sushma Pinnadhari
references.reference: I had the opportunity to work with Ajay on Pharmacovigilance R&D projects where he played a Software Engineer role at Accenture. Ajay is a very enthusiastic and talented team player. His creativity compliments his strong technical skills.He grew himself from a beginner to a critical resource of the technical team.I believe that Ajay would be an asset to any company as he  brings a tremendous amount of energy and expertise to his assignments.
